title: ChristCraft
description: Removes magic and spiritism where possible.
body:
# Christian Minecraft!
![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1406336513603665981?logo=discord&logoColor=white&label=Discord&color=5865F2&link=https%3A%2F%2Fdiscord.gg%2FSQQKpfJXKy)

### WARNING: If downloading the datapack
> Click on the version you want and download the resource pack too.


The bible instructs us to "abhor what is wicked" - Romans 12:9, _New World Translation_.

The aim of this pack is to remove spiritism, violence, etc. where possible, while not changing too much about the game.

**Please, join the discord server! You can suggest changes or additions, and report issues on the github! We need ideas!** Also, if you have experience with hardcoded structure modding we may need your guidance as changing dungeons and fortresses is out of reach for us as it stands.
